expectations.text: Ran 7 manual checks (old skill has no verify.sh)
expectations.evidence: Shows manual commands for each check: npx jest, grep, git diff --stat etc.

expectations.text: All 7 verification checks present and numbered
expectations.evidence: All 7 checks present with 'Check N —' headers

expectations.text: Each check has evidence not just claims
expectations.evidence: Test output pasted, grep commands shown, import paths verified individually

expectations.text: Postcondition trace maps each PC to specific named test
expectations.evidence: 14/14 PCs mapped to exact test descriptions with file paths

expectations.text: Final diff classifies files as REQUIRED/ENABLING/DRIFT
Debug artifact check shows grep output
expectations.evidence: Shows full grep command and '(no output)' result

expectations.text: Import resolution check verifies each import
expectations.evidence: Every import in all 3 files listed with resolution target

expectations.text: Final verification report with overall verdict
expectations.evidence: Summary table with all 7 checks and OVERALL: PASS — all checks green
No banned language found. Includes 'Failure recovery log: No failures encountered'
